The '''Gunship Bomber''' was a bomber employed by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Clone Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] similar in appearance to the [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]].<ref name="GB:CC" /> During the [[Battle of Aargonar (Clone Wars)|Battle of Aargonar]], a Gunship Bomber Enhanced had crash-landed during the battle, where it was discovered by Jedi Knights Anakin Skywalker and A'Sharad Hett and later fixed up and used to lure a [[Gouka dragon]] to a Separatist hideout via its engines, manipulating the dragon's natural attraction to starship engines.<ref name="Republic59">[[Republic 59|''Republic'' 59]]</ref>
